_provenance.note: Public credential-bundle test vector retained from the pinned upstream Jest test (__tests__/crypto-test.ts lines 179-184).

invalid_prefix.expected_error_message: failed to uncompress raw public key: invalid prefix

invalid_length.note: Upstream feeds keypair.publicKey + keypair.publicKey (66 bytes); we use any non-33-byte buffer.
invalid_length.expected_error_message: failed to uncompress raw public key: invalid length

compressRawPublicKey.roundtrip_note: compress(publicKeyUncompressed) === publicKey for any P-256 key pair.
